text: Nina. NYT over coffee this morning had a whole feature on midwifery shortages globally. Then walked into three visits in Knocknacarra and got another HSE circular. Life imitates art.
Hah. What did the circular say this time? Please not another restructure.
Nothing concrete, just enough vagueness to make you nervous. Salthill clinic all afternoon so I'll find out what the others think. Prom run after if it stays dry.
Send me the link to the article later. Colin surviving the chaos?

Hard to believe we got 2,200 signatures on the Galway birth centre petition in under three months. Families in the west want this. The evidence is there. Now for the politics. #BirthCentreGalway #Midwifery

Day-5 postnatal visit done. 50km round trip for a newborn weight check and a feeding assessment. Worth every mile, but this is exactly why the staffing numbers need to change. #CommunityMidwifery #HSEWest
Sky Road run this morning. Misty all the way out and then the clouds cleared over Clifden Bay on the descent. I will never stop doing this loop. #Connemara #Running #IrelandRunning
Abstract accepted for the INMO Western Branch Midwifery Conference in March. Presenting on day-5 postnatal gaps in rural HSE West. Nervous and proud in equal measure. #INMO #Midwifery #NUIG

Hampton's Rest full for the Connemara Marathon weekend. Wonderful to have runners from all over the island staying with us. Bacon and eggs at 6:30am and everyone out the door by 7. #HamptonsRest #Connemara #ConnemaraMarathon

The Birthplace UK study found freestanding midwifery units are as safe as obstetric units for low-risk women AND have significantly fewer interventions. If this was a drug we'd be mandating it. #EvidenceBasedBirth #BirthCentreGalway

Module 4 assignment submitted. The NUIG Masters is the best thing I've done for my clinical practice in years. Highly recommend to any community midwife thinking about it. #NUIG #UniversityOfGalway #MidwiferyMasters

Galway City Hall consultation was packed to the rafters last week. Families from Clifden, Tuam, Ballinasloe — all with the same story. We need a birth centre in the west. #GalwayBirthCentre #MaternityIreland
Salthill Prom this evening. Wind off the bay, tide in, goosebumps. Some runs are just for the soul. #Salthill #Galway #Running

NRP recertification booked for January. Mandatory for community midwives and absolutely should be — when you're the only clinician in the room, there's no margin for being rusty. #NRP #NeonatalResuscitation #CommunityMidwifery
Sky Road Room at Hampton's Rest just got its best review of the year. "Felt like staying with family." That's what we aim for. #HamptonsRest #Clifden #Connemara #BnB
